prompt.content:
We want to identify new high potential ancillary businesses for Forma. We have gathered information on ancillary launches by comparable businesses in past few years. We want to conduct an analysis and determine which ancillary offerings have driven the highest improvement in revenue growth rates, using the trends provided in ancilliary launch revenue trends

For this analysis, we will compare the 2-year CAGR before launch with the 2-year CAGR post launch - that is, CAGR from launch year minus two to the launch year, and CAGR from the launch year to two years post-launch.

Report the following as a response in the console:
1) What is the overall improvement in CAGR across all the launches by Forma's competitors
2) Which are the top two ancillary offerings by total margin improvement, and how much improvement in CAGR did each of them deliver?
3) Which are the bottom two ancillary offerings by total margin improvement, and what change in CAGR did they deliver?

Aggregate revenues across all launches to calculate the average CAGRs. Round final CAGR values and  intermediary calculations to two decimal places.

rubrics.name: States overall improvement in 2-year CAGR across all competitor launches is... (ver_9aa563b65bd64ad097a914899e24d36b)

messages.content: States overall improvement in 2-year CAGR across all competitor launches is 0.65% (acceptable range 0.64% to 0.66%).

rubrics.name: States overall improvement in 2-year CAGR across all competitor launches is... (ver_9aa563b65bd64ad097a914899e24d36b)

messages.content: States overall improvement in 2-year CAGR across all competitor launches is anything other than 0.65%.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
1) Overall improvement in 2-year CAGR across all competitor launches is 0.65%

2) Top two ancillary offerings and corresponding improvement in 2-year CAGR:
- Smart Home Setup: 0.96%
- Premium Delivery: 0.77 pp%

3) Bottom two ancillary offerings and corresponding change in 2-year CAGR:
- Subscription Care Plan: -0.13%
- Furniture Insurance: -0.06%
